channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: Finding goals that matter
item.description:
Notes:

When you are identifying goals to spend your time on, identify the returnables from progress toward said goals. If the returnables from the goals are tangible and substantial to your desired future then the goals are worth spending time on.

Sources:

  • Newport, C. (2016). Deep work: Rules for focused success in a distracted world.
